body.title: Fix claudecode/ → lab/claudecode/ path refs in installer + Igor internals
body.result: Fixed 11 path refs across installer.py + install_igor_linux.sh + 7 wild_igor/igor files. Grep check clean. Same-shape sweep after T-fix-skills-sync-rsync-path.
body.description:
Same-shape bug as T-fix-skills-sync-rsync-path: when claudecode/ moved under lab/, multiple files kept old-path references. Sweeping fix.

**Affected files:**
- wild_igor/setup_assets/installer.py (4 refs: skills_src, seed_dir, mcp_script, uninstall_cc skills_src + docstring comment)
- lab/claudecode/install_igor_linux.sh (1 ref: SKILLS_SRC)
- wild_igor/igor/cognition/reading_indexer.py (1 ref: sys.path hack for cc_queue import)
- wild_igor/igor/tools/reading_tool.py (1 ref: reading_worker.py spawn path)
- wild_igor/igor/tools/reading_integration.py (1 ref: _INTEGRATOR constant)

**Design rules:** docs-in-code (doesn't apply — simple path constants); test-plan-or-why-not (applies — plan below); others n/a

**Scope boundary:** In: code path constants pointing at `claudecode/` that should be `lab/claudecode/`. Out: docs referencing the old path (separate follow-up), comments in unrelated files, paths.py `self._runtime / "claudecode"` (that's runtime dir, intentional).

**Test plan:** `grep -rn '"claudecode"' wild_igor/ lab/ | grep -v lab/claudecode | grep -v 'send.*claudecode' | grep -v '_runtime.*claudecode'` should return 0 matches after fix. No new unit tests — these are path constants used at install/runtime; regression coverage comes from the install flow itself.
